use_cases: Display frequently asked questions with expandable answers on pricing or landing pages
Reduce support load by proactively answering common customer questions
Organize help content with smooth animated expand/collapse interactions
Present FAQ content with a professional gradient background on SaaS landing pages
Use as part of a comprehensive help center or documentation section
ai_summary: A React FAQ accordion component that displays expandable question-and-answer pairs with smooth framer-motion animations. Features a minimalist design with a subtle gradient background, using click-to-reveal interaction for showing answers. Built with Tailwind CSS and lucide-react icons, designed for SaaS pricing pages, landing pages, and help center sections to address common customer questions about plans, billing, and support.
